title: BEM-872 final mailbox validation
objective:
Run script:
"""
mail = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM872_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_RESPONSE.md')
text = mail.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if mail.exists() else ''
final = 'APPROVED_WITH_NOTES' if 'Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES' in text else ('BLOCKED_WITH_REASON' if 'Status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON' in text else '')
sections = ['Findings:', 'Evidence:', 'Roadmap:', 'Strategic variants:', 'Recommendation:']
has_sections = all(token in text for token in sections)
status = 'CURATOR_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_CONFIRMED_' + final if mail.exists() and final and has_sections else 'CURATOR_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_INCOMPLETE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM872_FINAL_VALIDATION_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-872 final Curator roadmap validation\nStatus: ' + status + '\nMailbox exists: ' + str(mail.exists()) + '\nFinal: ' + final + '\nHas sections: ' + str(has_sections) + '\n\nMailbox text:\n' + text[:10000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM872 final Curator roadmap validation: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
